title: Log To
description: Craft sticks and chests using logs!
body:
# Logs to Things

Craft logs to sticks or chests!

## Features

- Craft 4 chests using 9 logs in a chest-shaped pattern.
- Craft 16 sticks using 2 logs placed vertically.

## Installation

1. Download the datapack ZIP file.
2. Place it in your world's `datapacks` folder.
3. Reload the world with `/reload` or restart the game.

## License
